ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date_hour" TEXT /* Date and hour of the energy market data */,
  "date_hour_time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the energy market data */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., CAPITL, CENTRL) */,
  "zone_ptid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the zone */,
  "dam_zonal_lbmp" REAL /* Day-Ahead Market (DAM) zonal locational marginal price (LBMP) */,
  "dam_zonal_losses" REAL /* DAM zonal losses */,
  "dam_zonal_congestion" REAL /* DAM zonal congestion */,
  "dam_zonal_price_version" INTEGER /* Version of the DAM zonal price */,
  "total_energy_demand" REAL /* Total energy demand in the zone during the specified hour */,
  "total_energy_supply" REAL /* Total energy supply in the zone during the specified hour */,
  "price_volatility" REAL /* Measure of price volatility in the zone during the specified hour */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions that may affect energy demand and supply */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast compared to actual values */,
  "renewable_energy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy supply from renewable sources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_date_hour_time_zone FOREIGN KEY ("date_hour_time_zone") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_zone_name FOREIGN KEY ("zone_name") REFERENCES zones ("zone_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., CAPITL, CENTRL) */,
  "zone_ptid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the zone */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the zone */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the zone */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the zone */,
  "industrial_activity" TEXT /* Level of industrial activity in the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_zones" (
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "time_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone (e.g., EST, CST) */,
  "utc_offset" TEXT /* UTC offset of the time zone */,
  "daylight_saving" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the time zone observes daylight saving time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the market participant */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of market participant (e.g., generator, supplier, consumer) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the participant */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the participant type */,
  "registered_energy_capacity" REAL /* Registered energy capacity for generators */,
  "consumption_history" TEXT /* Historical energy consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy usage entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market participant */,
  "date_hour" TEXT /* Date and hour of the energy usage */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the energy is consumed */,
  "source_of_energy" TEXT /* Source of the consumed energy (e.g., coal, natural gas, renewable) */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "carbon_footprint" REAL /* Estimated carbon footprint of the energy consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES market_participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the organization */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
